markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 25, 2026 6 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 77.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 77.99° on Jun 25, 2026 at 6am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Junior Caminero records 4+ hits in the Kansas City vs Tampa Bay professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026 at 12:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Junior Caminero is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Junior Caminero starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Junior Caminero is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Junior Caminero is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Junior Caminero: 4+ hits?
